title: beskid import lib + ExternalLibrary registry

source.subject: feat(spec,compiler): beskid import lib + ExternalLibrary closed registry (v0.3)

body:
Ships `beskid import lib` and a closed **ExternalLibrary** registry in compiler + platform-spec, normative under foreign-libraries feature.

## Platform specification

- **Foreign libraries** — `/platform-spec/language-meta/interop/foreign-libraries` — *implements* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`a150be3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/a150be3)
- **Subject:** feat(spec,compiler): beskid import lib + ExternalLibrary closed registry (v0.3)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `language-meta`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`). Normative spec: **Foreign libraries** (*implements*).
